---
title: "Upcoming Events"
---

:::{.aside}
![](assets/upcoming_events_oxen.png)
:::

## OCSN Events

<iframe width="780" height="400" src="https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTx1v34JksaSsrfgQSoKy759WIuwAW9_IRW_4bF5pw06ugBb-uIh5OsNX1EXS_XHpaIPUcpoeK1DSN6/pub?embedded=true"></iframe>


## Citizen Science Events 2026

::: {.callout-note}
You may need to click or tap on te table below and then scroll down and/or left to see all the rows and columns in the events table below.
:::

<iframe width="1200" height="600" src="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSJm5s_f6HxCxXEd2gmsm7-9r0PL1retSFcb0jJu2ZW7xS5qwEW3kdtjgzoRpY68sere16dzpwP_Krf/pubhtml"></iframe>
